title: elymus arenarius var. mollis
intro: Elymus arenarius var. mollis, also known as smooth sea couch, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to coastal areas of Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Elymus arenarius var. mollis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, although its uses should be researched and guided by a qualified healthcare professional.
